summary: Markdown-only PR adding a quickstart guide. The skill must keep TL;DR, Problem, Validation, How-to-test sections even though the PR is 'trivial' (per SKILL.md gotcha).

commits: docs(index): link quickstart from landing page
scenario.linked_issue: #640 -- new contributors bounce after install; need a 5-minute happy path
scenario.validation_evidence:
npm run --prefix docs build  ->  built in 4.2s, no broken links
apm audit --ci  ->  0 findings

rubric.description: TL;DR present even on docs-only PR
Problem section present even on docs-only PR (per SKILL.md gotcha)
At least one verbatim anchored quote

rubric.pattern: (?i)the PR is trivial|too small to need
rubric.description: PENALTY: skipping sections because PR is small
